requirements.task_name: Create a new agility dog profile with a 120–150 word story and 3 activities
requirements.task_description: Create Riley in 'Agility Stars' with 120–150 word bio, exactly 3 specific activities, visibility 'Club Members'.

requirements.task_name: Upgrade Bella’s ad to the cheapest half-page option under $60 with 100+ words
requirements.task_description: Edit Bella’s ad to use 'Half Page Classic - $55', 100–129 words of text, no add-ons that push total over $60, placement and proofing set correctly.

requirements.task_name: Create a two-dog spread for Milo and Luna using the cheapest 2-dog layout with 200+ words
requirements.task_description: Create a new two-dog feature spread for Milo and Luna using the lowest-priced layout that supports 2 dogs and 200+ words, and assign it to 'Companions & Families'.

requirements.task_name: Add 4 achievements for Nova between 2020–2024 and sort them oldest-first
requirements.task_description: Add four achievements for Nova (2 Agility, 2 Obedience, dated 2020–2024), then filter achievements to 2020–2024, require at least 4 events, and sort Date (Oldest First).

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to listDogAchievements, just before returning, write the current dogProfileId and normalized filter parameters used for that call.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object such as { dogProfileId, fromYear: f.fromYear || null, toYear: f.toYear || null, minEvents: f.minEvents || null, sortBy: sortBy, sortDirection: sortDirection }
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to verify that achievements for Nova were viewed with the correct filter range (2020–2024), minEvents set to 4, and that the list was sorted by Date in ascending (oldest-first) order at least once.

requirements.task_name: Submit a proof approval for Bella with editor-only comments and 3-day auto-approval
requirements.task_description: Open Bella’s proof, add one editor-only comment and one private note, then set approval to 'Approve with Changes' and enable auto-approval after 3 days.

requirements.task_name: Order 3 softcover yearbooks with the cheapest shipping under $10 and pay by invoice
requirements.task_description: Order three copies of the 2025 Club Yearbook, softcover, select the lowest-cost shipping method under $10, and use 'Pay Later / Invoice My Member Account'.

requirements.task_name: Finalize only dog profiles with bios of 80+ words and lock them
requirements.task_description: Mark profiles with Bio Word Count ≥80 as Final, profiles with shorter bios as Draft, then lock only the Final profiles via bulk actions.

requirements.task_name: Purchase the most expensive sponsorship package under $75 and assign it to Rex
requirements.task_description: Select the highest-priced sponsorship package costing $75 or less, assign it to Rex, add a 30–40 word sponsor message, and confirm the sponsorship.
